---
title: 'I''m so confused...'
date: '2019-05-30T05:06:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4991320663433854489'
blogger_filename: '/2019/05/im-so-confused.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

Am I missing something?<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div style="background-color: white; color: #1c1e21; font-family: &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, &quot;Segoe UI&quot;, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px;">
<div class="_1t_p clearfix" style="font-family: inherit; margin-bottom: 15px; position: relative; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_41ud" style="font-family: inherit; margin-left: 36px;">

<div aria-label="Don't try to be better than somebody.....try to make somebody better." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">Don't try to be better than somebody.....try to make somebody better.</span></div>

</div>

<div class="_pyf" style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); border-radius: 1px; display: inline-block; font-family: inherit; height: 32px; margin-left: -10px; position: absolute; width: 2px;">
</div>
<div class="_4k7e _4ik4 _4ik5" style="-webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; display: -webkit-box; float: none; font-family: inherit; line-height: 16px; max-height: 32px; overflow: hidden; white-space: normal;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;">Don't try to be better than somebody.....try to make somebody better.</span></div>
</blockquote>
</a><div aria-label="That's a good one. I like that." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">That's a good one. I like that.</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div style="background-color: white; color: #1c1e21; font-family: &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, &quot;Segoe UI&quot;, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px;">
<div class="_1t_p clearfix" style="font-family: inherit; margin-bottom: 15px; position: relative; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_41ud" style="font-family: inherit; margin-left: 36px;">
<h5 aria-label="Darrell" class="_ih3 accessible_elem _-ne" style="clip: rect(1px, 1px, 1px, 1px); color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; height: 1px; line-height: 1.28; margin: 0px 0px 1px; opacity: 0; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px 0px 0px 12px; position: absolute; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; width: 1px;">
Darrell</h5>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="11:10 AM" data-tooltip-position="right" id="js_of" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em 1.3em 4px; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 359.648px; top: 32.6818px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"></span></span><div aria-label="Hey... So I have been praying, A LOT, lately. This morning Daddy and I had a really great talk, and some if it was about you..." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">Hey... So I have been praying, A LOT, lately. This morning Daddy and I had a really great talk, and some if it was about you...</span></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="11:11 AM" data-tooltip-position="right" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em 4px 4px 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 214.818px; top: 15.2273px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"></span></span><div aria-label="A lot of it was for my ears only." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">A lot of it was for my ears only.</span></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="11:11 AM" data-tooltip-position="right" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em 4px 4px 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 309.909px; top: 15.2273px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"></span></span><div aria-label="The part I felt He wanted me to share was this:" class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">The part I felt He wanted me to share was this:</span></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="11:13 AM" data-tooltip-position="right" id="js_ol" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em 4px 4px 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 359.648px; top: 32.6818px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"></span></span><div aria-label="I want to apologize for being a but selfish towards you. I was so focused on me that I wasn't focused on your needs." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">I want to apologize for being a but selfish towards you. I was so focused on me that I wasn't focused on your needs.</span></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="11:13 AM" data-tooltip-position="right" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em 4px 4px 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 359.648px; top: 23.9545px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"></span></span><div aria-label="I now have a better understanding of what season you are in, and I will not put any more pressure on you." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">I now have a better understanding of what season you are in, and I will not put any more pressure on you.</span></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="11:14 AM" data-tooltip-position="right" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em 4px 4px 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 359.648px; top: 41.4091px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"></span></span><div aria-label="I WILL be here for you in any way that I can. I'll be praying and interceding, fighting demons. And I will be here to listen or talk any time, day or night, if you want a friendly ear." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">I WILL be here for you in any way that I can. I'll be praying and interceding, fighting demons. And I will be here to listen or talk any time, day or night, if you want a friendly ear.</span></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="11:16 AM" data-tooltip-position="right" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em 4px 4px 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 359.648px; top: 23.9545px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"></span></span><div aria-label="He really thinks you are quite an awesome woman... And he really loves you." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">He really thinks you are quite an awesome woman... And he really loves you.</span></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="11:17 AM" data-tooltip-position="right" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em 4px 1.3em 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 359.648px; top: 32.6818px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"></span></span><div aria-label="Have a great day! Be Amazing. Be impressive. Slow down and make Him #1 priority. I'll be around if you need me." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">Have a great day! Be Amazing. Be impressive. Slow down and make Him #1 priority. I'll be around if you need me.</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<h4 class="_497p _2lpt" style="background-color: white; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); font-family: &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, &quot;Segoe UI&quot;, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; margin: 12px 0px 12px 20px; padding: 0px; text-align: center; text-transform: uppercase;">

<div class="_41ud" style="font-family: inherit; margin-left: 36px;">
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _29_7 direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_o46 _3erg _29_7 _3egs" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; background-position: initial; background-repeat: initial; background-size: initial; font-family: inherit; position: relative;">

</div>
<div class="_5z-5  _3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _3oh- _6uum" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="5:17 PM" data-tooltip-position="left" id="js_qt" style="background-color: #f1f0f0; border-radius: 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: left; color: black; float: left; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px 10px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: left; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="display: flex; font-family: inherit; left: 359.648px; position: absolute; top: 54.6818px; transform: translate(10%, -50%); width: 110px;"></span></span><a class="_6e6n" href="https://www.facebook.com/messages/t/100006410115712#" style="color: black; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; text-decoration-line: none;"><blockquote class="_pye" style="color: #828282; display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; margin: 6px 0px; max-width: 100%; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding-left: 10px; position: relative;">
<div class="_pyf" style="background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); border-radius: 1px; display: inline-block; font-family: inherit; height: 32px; margin-left: -10px; position: absolute; width: 2px;">
</div>
<div class="_4k7e _4ik4 _4ik5" style="-webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; display: -webkit-box; float: none; font-family: inherit; line-height: 16px; max-height: 32px; overflow: hidden; white-space: normal;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;">Have a great day! Be Amazing. Be impressive. Slow down and make Him #1 priority. I'll be around if you need me.</span></div>
</blockquote>
</a><div aria-label="Thank you for being a good man and for growing up so well and so quickly this year. It has been incredible to watch" class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">Thank you for being a good man and for growing up so well and so quickly this year. It has been incredible to watch</span></div>
<div class="_4kf7 preview" style="bottom: -13px; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; left: 0px; padding: 0px 2px; position: absolute; right: 0px; text-align: right; z-index: 1;">
<div class="_7ef9" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="Darrell G Wolfe" style="display: inline-flex; font-family: inherit; margin-left: 5px;">
<div class="_aou" role="button" style="align-items: center; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 10px; bottom: -15px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 0px 2px 4px; color: #626262; display: flex; font-family: inherit; justify-content: center;" tabindex="0">

<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">It was nice having you while I did.</span></div>

</div>
</div>
<h4 class="_497p _2lpt" style="background-color: white; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); font-family: &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, &quot;Segoe UI&quot;, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; margin: 12px 0px 12px 20px; padding: 0px; text-align: center; text-transform: uppercase;">
<time class="_3oh-" style="user-select: text;">8:10 PM</time></h4>
<div style="background-color: white; color: #1c1e21; font-family: &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, &quot;Segoe UI&quot;, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px;">
<div class="_1t_p clearfix" style="font-family: inherit; margin-bottom: 15px; position: relative; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_1t_q" style="font-family: inherit;">
<div class="_7934 _150g uiPopover _6a _6b" style="cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; font-family: inherit; vertical-align: unset;">
<div aria-controls="js_ie" class="_4ldz _1t_r _p" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="Shelley Hunter" data-tooltip-position="left" id="js_id" role="button" style="bottom: 2px; font-family: inherit; height: 32px; max-height: 28px; max-width: 28px; position: absolute; width: 32px;">
<div class="_4ld-" style="align-items: center; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; font-family: inherit; height: 32px; justify-content: center; max-height: 28px; max-width: 28px; overflow: hidden; width: 32px;">
<img alt="Shelley Hunter" class="img" height="32" src="https://scontent.fhhr1-1.fna.fbcdn.net/v/t1.0-1/p80x80/60337502_2394622840761363_1340972915335626752_n.jpg?_nc_cat=110&amp;_nc_eui2=AeHmbXE7L0lgFFYDODVHx8NF3J8UUhTTx9rPdxkYN5yiPsVz7kkXHckOta2pxM2bgfXc_L_PqmmNX-B2-WpJ0wHYvnjNtfGD_h-ypvUeTAzM2Q&amp;_nc_oc=AQnwObRk_wFcBB-6_91b7sTWOuS3c5vfEf_KN1B5M8gcxzmT0gNh-uF9W--Ymg-auMDu67Wl3AHewP9ei15RpFyE&amp;_nc_ht=scontent.fhhr1-1.fna&amp;oh=ddf1ce26aa2024eed6ec6a89bb7059be&amp;oe=5D8CD06A" style="border: 0px; max-height: 28px; max-width: 28px; object-fit: cover;" width="32" /></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="_41ud" style="font-family: inherit; margin-left: 36px;">
<h5 aria-label="***Shelley Renea Fox***" class="_ih3 _-ne" style="color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; height: 0px; line-height: 1.28; margin: 0px 0px 1px; opacity: 0; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px 0px 0px 12px; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;"></span></h5>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _29_7 direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_5z-5 _3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="8:10 PM" data-tooltip-position="left" id="js_ox" style="background-color: #f1f0f0; border-radius: 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: left; color: black; float: left; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px 10px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: left; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="display: flex; font-family: inherit; left: 359.648px; position: absolute; top: 76.3182px; transform: translate(10%, -50%); width: 110px;"></span></span><div aria-label="Why does it have to be like that why just because I'm fully in a season where I'm going going going and don't even have time to play with my children like I used to 4 in a season where I'm learning what single means or in a season where I spend as much time as possible trying to make money or trying to make the house safer excetera excetera I mean why does it have to be like all or nothing" class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">Why does it have to be like that why just because I'm fully in a season where I'm going going going and don't even have time to play with my children like I used to 4 in a season where I'm learning what single means or in a season where I spend as much time as possible trying to make money or trying to make the house safer excetera excetera I mean why does it have to be like all or nothing</span></div>
<div class="_4kf7 preview" style="bottom: -13px; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; left: 0px; padding: 0px 2px; position: absolute; right: 0px; text-align: right; z-index: 1;">
<div class="_7ef9" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="Darrell G Wolfe" style="display: inline-flex; font-family: inherit; margin-left: 5px;">
<div class="_aou" role="button" style="align-items: center; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 10px; bottom: -15px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 0px 2px 4px; color: #626262; display: flex; font-family: inherit; justify-content: center;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_4kf5" style="align-items: center; background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; background-position: initial; background-repeat: initial; background-size: initial; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; font-family: inherit; height: 20px; justify-content: center; line-height: 0; margin-left: 0px; min-width: 20px; z-index: 1;"><span style="font-family: inherit;"><img alt="" class="_1ift _5m3a img" src="/images/imported/static-xx-fbcdn-net/1f44d-ce7935d3053d.png" style="border: 0px; display: inline-block; height: 1em; margin: 0px 1px; pointer-events: none; vertical-align: middle;" /></span></span><span class="_4kf5 _4kf6 _fy2" style="align-items: center; background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; background-position: initial; background-repeat: initial; background-size: initial; border-radius: 50%; box-sizing: border-box; color: #0084ff; display: flex; font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; height: 20px; justify-content: center; line-height: 0; margin-left: -5px; margin-right: -3px; min-width: 20px; padding: 4px;">1</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div style="background-color: white; color: #1c1e21; font-family: &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, &quot;Segoe UI&quot;, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px;">

<div class="_4ld-" style="align-items: center; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; font-family: inherit; height: 32px; justify-content: center; max-height: 28px; max-width: 28px; overflow: hidden; width: 32px;">

<div class="_41ud" style="font-family: inherit; margin-left: 36px;">
<h5 aria-label="***Shelley Renea Fox***" class="_ih3 _-ne" style="color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; height: 0px; line-height: 1.28; margin: 0px 0px 1px; opacity: 0; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px 0px 0px 12px; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;"></span></h5>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _29_7 direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_5z-5 _3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="8:10 PM" data-tooltip-position="left" style="background-color: #f1f0f0; border-radius: 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: left; color: black; float: left; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px 10px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: left; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="display: flex; font-family: inherit; left: 359.648px; position: absolute; top: 58.8636px; transform: translate(10%, -50%); width: 110px;"></span></span><div aria-label="You're still kind of my benchmark for a lot of things and you're still the person that would understand certain things more on the spiritual side. So you're still the one that I run things by when I think they're really cool. And what did you think about the new slogan or saying for a shirt" class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">You're still kind of my benchmark for a lot of things and you're still the person that would understand certain things more on the spiritual side. So you're still the one that I run things by when I think they're really cool. And what did you think about the new slogan or saying for a shirt</span></div>
<div class="_4kf7 preview" style="bottom: -13px; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; left: 0px; padding: 0px 2px; position: absolute; right: 0px; text-align: right; z-index: 1;">
<div class="_7ef9" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="Darrell G Wolfe" style="display: inline-flex; font-family: inherit; margin-left: 5px;">
<div class="_aou" role="button" style="align-items: center; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 10px; bottom: -15px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 0px 2px 4px; color: #626262; display: flex; font-family: inherit; justify-content: center;" tabindex="0">

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div style="background-color: white; color: #1c1e21; font-family: &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, &quot;Segoe UI&quot;, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px;">
<div class="_1t_p clearfix" style="font-family: inherit; margin-bottom: 15px; position: relative; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_1t_q" style="font-family: inherit;">
<div class="_7934 _150g uiPopover _6a _6b" style="cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; font-family: inherit; vertical-align: unset;">
<div aria-controls="js_ii" class="_4ldz _1t_r _p" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="Shelley Hunter" data-tooltip-position="left" id="js_ih" role="button" style="bottom: 2px; font-family: inherit; height: 32px; max-height: 28px; max-width: 28px; position: absolute; width: 32px;">
<div class="_4ld-" style="align-items: center; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; font-family: inherit; height: 32px; justify-content: center; max-height: 28px; max-width: 28px; overflow: hidden; width: 32px;">
<img alt="Shelley Hunter" class="img" height="32" src="https://scontent.fhhr1-1.fna.fbcdn.net/v/t1.0-1/p80x80/60337502_2394622840761363_1340972915335626752_n.jpg?_nc_cat=110&amp;_nc_eui2=AeHmbXE7L0lgFFYDODVHx8NF3J8UUhTTx9rPdxkYN5yiPsVz7kkXHckOta2pxM2bgfXc_L_PqmmNX-B2-WpJ0wHYvnjNtfGD_h-ypvUeTAzM2Q&amp;_nc_oc=AQnwObRk_wFcBB-6_91b7sTWOuS3c5vfEf_KN1B5M8gcxzmT0gNh-uF9W--Ymg-auMDu67Wl3AHewP9ei15RpFyE&amp;_nc_ht=scontent.fhhr1-1.fna&amp;oh=ddf1ce26aa2024eed6ec6a89bb7059be&amp;oe=5D8CD06A" style="border: 0px; max-height: 28px; max-width: 28px; object-fit: cover;" width="32" /></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="_41ud" style="font-family: inherit; margin-left: 36px;">
<h5 aria-label="***Shelley Renea Fox***" class="_ih3 _-ne" style="color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; height: 0px; line-height: 1.28; margin: 0px 0px 1px; opacity: 0; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px 0px 0px 12px; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;"></span></h5>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _29_7 direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_5z-5 _3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="8:11 PM" data-tooltip-position="left" id="js_ed" style="background-color: #f1f0f0; border-radius: 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: left; color: black; float: left; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px 10px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: left; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="display: flex; font-family: inherit; left: 359.648px; position: absolute; top: 85.0455px; transform: translate(10%, -50%); width: 110px;"></span></span><div aria-label="I mean I still want to do this shirt thing and I still want to do the book thing and I still want to talk to you it just seems like I need to slow down a little for book reading and even when I was reading my Bible on Saturday that Kaitlin gymnastics it was still getting interrupted by our conversations. Which was fun and good and it got to the point where I think we can level out a little bit and not have to talk to each other everyday in order to get to know each other" class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">I mean I still want to do this shirt thing and I still want to do the book thing and I still want to talk to you it just seems like I need to slow down a little for book reading and even when I was reading my Bible on Saturday that Kaitlin gymnastics it was still getting interrupted by our conversations. Which was fun and good and it got to the point where I think we can level out a little bit and not have to talk to each other everyday in order to get to know each other</span></div>
<div class="_4kf7 preview" style="bottom: -13px; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; left: 0px; padding: 0px 2px; position: absolute; right: 0px; text-align: right; z-index: 1;">
<div class="_7ef9" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="Darrell G Wolfe" style="display: inline-flex; font-family: inherit; margin-left: 5px;">
<div class="_aou" role="button" style="align-items: center; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 10px; bottom: -15px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 0px 2px 4px; color: #626262; display: flex; font-family: inherit; justify-content: center;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_4kf5" style="align-items: center; background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; background-position: initial; background-repeat: initial; background-size: initial; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; font-family: inherit; height: 20px; justify-content: center; line-height: 0; margin-left: 0px; min-width: 20px; z-index: 1;"><span style="font-family: inherit;"><img alt="" class="_1ift _5m3a img" src="/images/imported/static-xx-fbcdn-net/1f44d-ce7935d3053d.png" style="border: 0px; display: inline-block; height: 1em; margin: 0px 1px; pointer-events: none; vertical-align: middle;" /></span></span><span class="_4kf5 _4kf6 _fy2" style="align-items: center; background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; background-position: initial; background-repeat: initial; background-size: initial; border-radius: 50%; box-sizing: border-box; color: #0084ff; display: flex; font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; height: 20px; justify-content: center; line-height: 0; margin-left: -5px; margin-right: -3px; min-width: 20px; padding: 4px;">1</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="_4jzq _jf4 _jf5" style="bottom: 0px; clear: both; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 0px; position: absolute; right: -18px;"><img alt="Seen by Shelley Hunter at 8:11 PM" class="_jf2 img" src="https://scontent.fhhr1-1.fna.fbcdn.net/v/t1.0-1/p80x80/60337502_2394622840761363_1340972915335626752_n.jpg?_nc_cat=110&amp;_nc_eui2=AeHmbXE7L0lgFFYDODVHx8NF3J8UUhTTx9rPdxkYN5yiPsVz7kkXHckOta2pxM2bgfXc_L_PqmmNX-B2-WpJ0wHYvnjNtfGD_h-ypvUeTAzM2Q&amp;_nc_oc=AQnwObRk_wFcBB-6_91b7sTWOuS3c5vfEf_KN1B5M8gcxzmT0gNh-uF9W--Ymg-auMDu67Wl3AHewP9ei15RpFyE&amp;_nc_ht=scontent.fhhr1-1.fna&amp;oh=ddf1ce26aa2024eed6ec6a89bb7059be&amp;oe=5D8CD06A" style="border-radius: 50%; border: 0px; display: inline-block; height: 15px; margin-left: 3px; vertical-align: middle; width: 15px;" title="Seen by Shelley Hunter at 8:11 PM" /></span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div style="background-color: white; color: #1c1e21; font-family: &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, &quot;Segoe UI&quot;, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px;">
<div class="_1t_p clearfix" style="font-family: inherit; margin-bottom: 15px; position: relative; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_41ud" style="font-family: inherit; margin-left: 36px;">
<h5 aria-label="Darrell" class="_ih3 accessible_elem _-ne" style="clip: rect(1px, 1px, 1px, 1px); color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; height: 1px; line-height: 1.28; margin: 0px 0px 1px; opacity: 0; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px 0px 0px 12px; position: absolute; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; width: 1px;">
Darrell</h5>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="8:15 PM" data-tooltip-position="right" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 55.1136px; top: 15.2273px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"></span></span><div aria-label="Hm..." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">Hm...</span></div>
</div>
<span class="_2her _9ah" style="background: none currentcolor; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid currentcolor; bottom: 1px; box-sizing: border-box; color: #0084ff; display: inline-block; font-family: inherit; height: 10px; position: absolute; right: -15px; vertical-align: middle; width: 10px;" title="Delivered"><i aria-label="Delivered" aria-roledescription="Status icon" class="_57e_" role="img" style="border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; border-style: solid; border-width: 0px 0px 1px 1px; color: white; display: block; height: 1px; margin-left: 3px; margin-top: 4px; transform-origin: 0% 100%; transform: rotate(-45deg); width: 4px;"></i></span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div style="background-color: white; color: #1c1e21; font-family: &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, &quot;Segoe UI&quot;, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px;">
<div class="_1t_p clearfix" style="font-family: inherit; margin-bottom: 15px; position: relative; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_41ud" style="font-family: inherit; margin-left: 36px;">
<h5 aria-label="Darrell" class="_ih3 accessible_elem _-ne" style="clip: rect(1px, 1px, 1px, 1px); color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; height: 1px; line-height: 1.28; margin: 0px 0px 1px; opacity: 0; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px 0px 0px 12px; position: absolute; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; width: 1px;">
Darrell</h5>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="8:42 PM" data-tooltip-position="right" id="js_bp" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 359.648px; top: 172.318px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"></span></span><div aria-label="I honestly don't think I can communicate in a way you would hear it. Maybe text isn't the right medium. We can talk by phone some other time. 

I am not there, so I can't see what's happening and you haven't told me. Those three paragraphs just now are the closest I've come to knowing why you disappeared for weeks.

You're not here and you can't see what it appears to be on my side. 

It could be a big misunderstanding. But I also don't think we've been on the same page about &quot;us&quot; since Mediation.

Let's just say I miss you. And we'll leave it at that until your life slows down for a longer phone conversation some day." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none !important;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">I honestly don't think I can communicate in a way you would hear it. Maybe text isn't the right medium. We can talk by phone some other time. 

I am not there, so I can't see what's happening and you haven't told me. Those three paragraphs just now are the closest I've come to knowing why you disappeared for weeks.

You're not here and you can't see what it appears to be on my side. 

It could be a big misunderstanding. But I also don't think we've been on the same page about "us" since Mediation.

Let's just say I miss you. And we'll leave it at that until your life slows down for a longer phone conversation some day.</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
